header.title: Game dev behind the scenes

pixelart.title: Pixel art
pixelart.sub_title: Hand-crafted sprites and icons — every pixel on purpose.

items.title: Hero
items.description: A 16×16 protagonist with a readable silhouette at low resolution.

items.title: Slime
items.description: A simple enemy, great for hitbox tests and combat feedback.

items.title: Blade
items.description: A combat item with diagonal read and strong contrast.

items.title: Chest
items.description: Reward prop with a highlighted center lock.

items.title: Key
items.description: Dungeon key — clear read even at 16×16.

items.title: Life
items.description: Arcade-style HP HUD with few pixels and maximum impact.

items.title: Coin
items.description: Score coin with a center highlight for quick feedback.

items.title: Mana
items.description: Mana vial for secondary resource bars.

items.title: Potion
items.description: Classic pickup — glow and color to stand out on the floor.

items.title: Gem
items.description: Rare loot crystal with a diamond silhouette.

items.title: Scroll
items.description: Quest/lore item with readable lines in miniature.

items.title: Bat
items.description: Aerial enemy study with open wings.

items.title: Hero (alt)
items.description: Protagonist palette variation for mood tests.

items.title: Torch
items.description: Lighting prop with suggested flicker in the flame.
